description: cdx-bmt-1 tagged Merkle roots, including the single-leaf identity and odd-node promotion.
oracle: Expected values were computed by an INDEPENDENT Python oracle (json + hashlib), not by the library under test, so a serializer or folding bug is caught rather than snapshotted.

vectors.name: single-leaf-root-leaf
vectors.description: A single leaf IS the root: the reduction terminates before any internal node is formed, so no 0x01 tag is applied.

vectors.name: two-leaf
vectors.description: The minimal pairing: root = H(0x01 || leaf0 || leaf1) over raw digest bytes.

vectors.name: three-leaf-one-promotion
vectors.description: An odd level promotes its unpaired final node unchanged instead of duplicating it — the CVE-2012-2459 defence. C is promoted once, then pairs at the top.

vectors.name: five-leaf-double-promotion
vectors.description: E is promoted through two successive odd levels before pairing, exercising repeated promotion.
